caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" text is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeated logo that includes the word "HUSTLE" and five yellow stars. A sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT". In the bottom left corner of the scene, a small circular logo is visible. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his left with a neutral facial expression. There is very little movement between the frames, with only subtle shifts in his posture and gaze as he listens or prepares to speak.
